purpose: Provide credentials to CLI server — GitHub OAuth, BYOK keys, env vars, or stored tokens — enabling model API access

activities.title: Detect Credential Source
activities.description: Priority: explicit gitHubToken > HMAC_KEY > COPILOT_API_URL direct > env vars (COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN > GH_TOKEN > GITHUB_TOKEN) > stored OAuth > gh CLI auth

activities.title: Pass Token via Connect Handshake
activities.description: Include gitHubToken and useLoggedInUser in connect() RPC params; CLI server validates and stores for session lifetime

activities.title: Configure BYOK Provider
activities.description: Pass ProviderConfig (type, baseUrl, apiKey/bearerToken, modelId, wireModel, maxInputTokens) in SessionConfig; CLI routes to custom endpoint

activities.title: Exchange Token for Copilot API Access
activities.description: CLI-internal: GitHub OAuth token exchanged for short-lived Copilot API token via internal endpoint; transparent to SDK

activities.title: Handle Token Expiry Mid-Session
activities.description: CLI auto-refreshes expired session tokens during a turn without requiring user re-authentication or message resend

activities.title: Validate Subscription Entitlement
activities.description: CLI verifies Copilot Pro/Pro+/Business/Enterprise subscription is active; rejects unsubscribed users
